narration: Ever wondered why your body shuts down during dreams?
visual_description: Hook visual: Ever wondered why your body shuts down during dreams?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Ever wondered why your body shuts down during dreams?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Ever wondered why your body shuts down during dreams?

narration: It's called REM atonia; your brain inhibits most muscles.
visual_description: Context visual: It's called REM atonia; your brain inhibits most muscles.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: It's called REM atonia; your brain inhibits most muscles.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: It's called REM atonia; your brain inhibits most muscles.

narration: This protective mechanism prevents you from acting out dreams.
visual_description: Escalation visual: This protective mechanism prevents you from acting out dreams.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: This protective mechanism prevents you from acting out dreams.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: This protective mechanism prevents you from acting out dreams.

narration: However, misfires can lead to sleep paralysis, an eerie experience.
visual_description: Evidence visual: However, misfires can lead to sleep paralysis, an eerie experience.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: However, misfires can lead to sleep paralysis, an eerie experience.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: However, misfires can lead to sleep paralysis, an eerie experience.

narration: Preliminary research suggests this might be a brain glitch.
